comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-006 (medium, acceptance-first). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/run-panelist-effort.tests.sh/.ps1 (28/28 passed both lanes; specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-006/focused-tests.log) and the epic-159-pillar-c cross-suite regression set (all six T-001..T-006 suites, both lanes, 0 failed; specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-006/regression.log). Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build) for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files. Per the implementation report (reports/implementation/epic-159-pillar-c/T-006.md): this task implements the Codex-host startup-path wiring as a documented SKILL.md procedure (resolve via select-agent-model --host codex-cli, cross-check against the .toml reference comments T-003 rendered, reject out-of-vocabulary values, launch codex) rather than a new script file, per tasks.md's own Planned Files list, and proves that exact recipe operationally in TEST-037/TEST-038 (real select-agent-model.sh/.ps1 output fed into run-panelist-gpt). TEST-040 confirms no test in this task's suite invokes a real LLM or network endpoint. The REQ-008 closing audit (AC-047/048) confirms every effort-consuming surface this feature added (T-004's run-record, this task's own panelist path) has a demonstrated Claude Code / non-flag-control degradation case, recorded in the suite output above (AC-039, AC-051 share). The human-copy application step for this task's re-staged test.yml candidate (now also carrying T-001's, T-003's, and T-005's earlier steps) and T-003's four still-pending reviewer-file candidates has not occurred as of this report -- expected, documented, not an implementation gap.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.

No network or service integration is in scope beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise against the real, fixture-copied or fixture-driven scripts this task edits; no separate service-integration surface exists.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.
No independently startable application/UI/service; this task's suite fully covers its own CLI/script surface via the focused and regression logs.

No baseline-behavior.md exists for this feature; this is not a refactor/bugfix task (differential-test-policy.md does not apply). The change is additive per design.md's API/Contract Plan; the saved red/green evidence and cross-suite regression set provide the applicable behavior comparison.
No user-facing UI surface; this task's Planned Files are contract/script/test/doc files only.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
